title: ononis viscosa subsp. sieberi
intro: Ononis viscosa subsp. sieberi, also known as Sieber's sticky restharrow, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ononis viscosa subsp. sieberi include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. In herbal preparations, this plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use is not widespread and more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
